title: Spanish Turkey Paella
description: A traditional Spanish dish with a twist, using turkey neck for added flavor. Serve with a side of garlic bread for a complete meal.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large paella pan over medium-high heat.
Add the diced onions and cook until translucent, about 5 minutes.
Add the turkey neck and cook until browned on all sides, about 5 minutes.
Add the Spanish rice and cook for 1-2 minutes, stirring constantly.
Add the garlicky chicken broth and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 20-25 minutes or until the rice is cooked.
Stir in the paella seasoning and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
